Lifeism abstains from taking dogmatic economic  positions such as [[capitalism]] vs [[socialism]] on the basis that such positions tend to lead to a lack of flexibility and inability to pursue goals

== Economic cycles ==
[[Overseer]] is downsizing, [[Underseer]] is worker's rights and stability<ref>[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 30 towards the end</ref>

== See Also ==

* [[capitalism]]
* [[socialism]]
* [[Virtual Engine]]

== References ==

[[Category:Economics]]
<references />
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Economics]]
[[Category:Pages]]
